healthcareDetails.prostheticOrthoticAvailability: Extremely limited or nonexistent in the Delta region
healthcareDetails.nearestKnownProviders: Jackson, MS (~50 km NE) or Memphis, TN (~120 km NW)

criticalGaps: The Mississippi Delta is one of the most economically distressed regions in the US
No dedicated prosthetic/orthotic facilities within the Delta region (within 50km)
Residents often must travel 50-120+ km for specialized rehabilitation
AMTRAC (advanced mobility wheelchair) and prosthetic coverage is nearly absent
High rates of diabetes, vascular disease, and trauma-related amputations in the Delta
estimatedAmputeePopulation: Very high - the Delta has some of the nation's highest rates of diabetes and obesity, driving amputation rates well above the national average
